Command.Name: auth
Command.Description: Sign in, inspect identity, and manage API keys

Command.Name: login
Command.Description: Sign in with username and password

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Command.Name: whoami
Command.Description: Show the authenticated user and current server

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Command.Name: logout
Command.Description: Remove stored credentials and end the current session

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output

Command.Description: Start a Quick Connect login flow

Command.Name: items
Command.Description: Browse, search, refresh, and update library items

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Extra fields to return, comma-separated (e.g. Overview,Path,MediaStreams)
Emit JSON instead of table output
Filter by media type (e.g. Video, Audio, Photo)
Parent folder ID to scope the query
Search recursively within the parent folder
Sort field (e.g. SortName, DateCreated, PremiereDate, ProductionYear, Random)
Include only item types, comma-separated (e.g. Movie,Series,Episode)
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')
Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')
Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
Parent folder ID to scope the latest shelf
Include only item types, comma-separated (e.g. Movie,Series,Episode)
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Command.Name: explain-latest
Command.Description: Explain why an item is or is not visible in latest

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
Override the parent library or folder used for latest ranking
How many latest items to inspect when computing rank
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')
Visible shelf size to compare against
Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
Filter by media type (e.g. Video, Audio)
Include only item types, comma-separated (e.g. Movie,Series)
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Command.Name: dates
Command.Description: Show date fields used for latest-items diagnostics

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
Include seasons and episodes beneath the item
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Command.Name: tree
Command.Description: Show a recursive item tree for diagnostics

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Include date columns useful for latest-items diagnostics
Emit JSON instead of table output
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Emit JSON instead of table output

Auto-page until all results are fetched

Replace all images during full refresh

Command.Name: remote-search
Command.Description: Search external metadata providers (TMDb, AniDB, IMDB, ...)

Option.Description: Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
Search a specific provider (e.g. TheMovieDb, AniDB, "The Open Movie Database")
Media type to search (Movie, Series, BoxSet, Person, MusicArtist, MusicAlbum, MusicVideo, Book, Trailer)
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')
Auto-page until all results are fetched
Emit JSON instead of table output
Output file path (defaults to item name in current directory)
User context for user-scoped commands (id or 'me')

Emit JSON instead of table output

Command.Description: Upload an image for an item
